ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the ad belongs to */,
  "fb_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Facebook campaign */,
  "reporting_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range of the target audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the target audience */,
  "interest1" INTEGER /* First interest category of the target audience */,
  "interest2" INTEGER /* Second interest category of the target audience */,
  "interest3" INTEGER /* Third interest category of the target audience */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was displayed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was clicked */,
  "spent" REAL /* Amount spent on the ad */,
  "total_conversion" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions from the ad */,
  "approved_conversion" INTEGER /* Number of approved conversions from the ad */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the ad is running */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the ad is displayed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device where the ad is displayed */,
  "creative_type" TEXT /* Type of creative used in the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate (conversions / clicks) */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate (clicks / impressions) */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click (spent / clicks) */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per conversion (spent / total_conversion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_interest2 FOREIGN KEY ("interest2") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_interest3 FOREIGN KEY ("interest3") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_interest1 FOREIGN KEY ("interest1") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the campaign is running */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation, sales) */,
  "target_audience_size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the target audience */,
  "estimated_reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the campaign */,
  "estimated_frequency" INTEGER /* Estimated frequency of ad impressions per user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the client is based */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the client operates */,
  "business_size" TEXT /* Size of the client's business (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest category */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest category */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the interest category is relevant */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the interest category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic segment */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the target audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the target audience */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the demographic segment is relevant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the demographic segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of ad content */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the content belongs to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline text of the ad */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description text of the ad */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image used in the ad */,
  "cta_button_text" TEXT /* Text on the call-to-action button */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the ad content is used */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the ad content */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the ad content (e.g., JPEG, PNG, MP4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the spending is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the spending */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the ad */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the spending is recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the spending */,
  "spending_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the spending (e.g., bid adjustment, budget increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_spending_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ad_performance ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad that led to the conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the conversion was approved */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., purchase, sign-up, download) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the conversion */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the conversion value */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the conversion occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ad_performance ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the user is active */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user uses */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_impressions" (
  "impression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impression */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad that was displayed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saw the ad */,
  "impression_date" TEXT /* Date of the impression */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the impression occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the impression */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device where the impression occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_impressions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_impressions_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ad_performance ("ad_id")
)
